description: If you love those dashing divas in the playboy centrefolds, you'll love the cool, casual range of footwear from this cheeky brand! Suitable for the suitably dashing young man-about-town, wear these to impress the girls, while keeping your feet nice and comfy. We recommend wearing these shoes with a clean-look pair of denims from lee and a cool printed tee to leave no doubt about your fashion credibility. Upper Canvas upper for comfort and durability Stitch detailing on the sides, front and at the heel Lace-ups for snug Fit and lace detailing on the sides for style Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Rubber non-marking outsole with thin multi directional grooves and branding for maximum grip and traction Wash care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
